channel.title: Use Case Intel — Threat Intel Feed
channel.description: High-fidelity IOCs aggregated from The Hacker News, BleepingComputer, Microsoft Security Blog and CISA KEV. Refreshed daily. CVEs/hashes via regex; domains/IPs only when defanged by the source author.

item.title: [SHA256/CRIT] e11f69b49b6f2e829454371c31ebf86893f82a042dae3f2faf63dcd84f97a584
item.description:
SHA256: e11f69b49b6f2e829454371c31ebf86893f82a042dae3f2faf63dcd84f97a584

Severity: crit · First seen: 2026-05-07 · Sources: Unit 42 (Palo Alto)

Context: Threat Brief: Exploitation of PAN-OS Captive Portal Zero-Day for Unauthenticated Remote Code Execution
